pattern: The base profit is fixed; one optional window rewrite changes only the prices inside it, so prefix sums let you evaluate every window's delta in constant time and keep the best.
hints: Start from the profit with no modification, then ask what each allowed window would add or subtract.
Rewriting a window zeroes the first half's contribution and turns the second half into pure sells, so its new value is just the sum of the second-half prices.

Precompute a prefix sum of prices and a prefix sum of strategy times price; for each window subtract its original contribution and add the second-half price sum, tracking the maximum delta to add to the base profit.

edge_inputs.description: modifying the front window is best
all holds, modification only helps via sells
all sells already, rewrite cannot improve much

stress.description: long arrays with an even random window size
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(2, size)
    prices = [rng.randrange(1, 100001) for _ in range(n)]
    strategy = [rng.randrange(-1, 2) for _ in range(n)]
    half = rng.randrange(1, n // 2 + 1)
    k = 2 * half
    return [prices, strategy, k]
stress.note: k is even and at most n by construction

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def maxProfit(self, prices, strategy, k):
        n = len(prices)
        h = k // 2
        pre_price = [0] * (n + 1)
        pre_sp = [0] * (n + 1)
        for i in range(n):
            pre_price[i + 1] = pre_price[i] + prices[i]
            pre_sp[i + 1] = pre_sp[i] + strategy[i] * prices[i]
        base = pre_sp[n]
        best_delta = 0
        for j in range(0, n - k + 1):
            orig = pre_sp[j + k] - pre_sp[j]
            second_half = pre_price[j + k] - pre_price[j + h]
            delta = second_half - orig
            if delta > best_delta:
                best_delta = delta
        return base + best_delta
